3205340.name: Warhavoc Demo
3205340.description:
Warhavoc is a top down arena shooter, using the classic arena shooter arsenal of weapons, just from a different perspective.

The Demo contains the first few levels of the full game.

Plot

Crashlanding on an alien planet, your objective is to clear off the bloodthirsty wild insectoid monsters.

Game Features


- Arena shooter weapon system
- Health and ammo pickups
- Keys to unlock gates
- Fully hand drawn art and world

Embark on this crazy adventure to purify the planet of filth *^*)9
3205340.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
